🍅 Pomodoro Timer

A minimal, distraction-free pomodoro timer. No account, no settings rabbit hole — just press start and work.

About this tool

This is the pomodoro timer I actually use: 25 minutes of focus, 5 minutes of break, and nothing else on the screen.

  • Runs entirely in your browser — nothing is sent anywhere
  • Works offline once loaded
  • Keyboard friendly: press Space to start/pause

If it helps you, share it with a friend.
